retry_reason: The put operation is unconditional when the pointer is valid; there is no failure mode to retry. Null/error pointers are handled safely as no-ops.
contract_summary: This function releases a reference on a crypto_acomp object (put) and frees the associated request and buffer. It is a cleanup operation: after calling this function, the caller must not use any of the resources (acomp, request, buffer) as they are invalidated. The function safely handles NULL and error pointers by doing nothing. It should be called exactly once for each successful initialization of acomp_ctx to avoid leaks or double-free.
